---
title: "synapse.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\skills\synapse.py"
loc: 12
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.07
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 8.07
overall_score: 5.15
---

## Intent
The `synapse.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [runpy](file://runpy)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
